markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, performance, and upcoming product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Critical Conversion Bug:** A bug is blocking signups, with one top-ranking article (200 visits/wk) yielding only one install. This is the top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [**December Launches:** Two major products are launching: a self-serve Code Review tool and a Context Engine MCP (Managed Context Provider) to make cheaper models perform like GPT-5.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** Focus is shifting to support the launches, with new clusters for Code Review comparisons and Context Engine MCP search intents.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [**Newsletter Experiment:** A newsletter test will proceed. If successful, it will be used to reactivate expired trials (a potential list of thousands/week).](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Conversion Bug

  - [Traffic is on target, but a critical bug is blocking signups.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Evidence:** A top-ranking article (200 visits/wk) yielded only one install.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** The bug is linked to recent website changes.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [**Contributing Factor:** The signup funnel has no download link until the final step, causing a 90% drop-off.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [**Data Integrity:** The signup metric's accuracy is unconfirmed. Augment Code is starting an internal project to QA its PostHog data.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)

### December Product Launches

  - [**1. Self-Serve Code Review Tool**](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [**Launch:** December.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Aggressive comparison articles (e.g., "Augment vs. Greptile vs. CodeRabbit").](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [**Proof Point:** Initial benchmarks show superior performance. Augment Code will provide the first draft for content.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [**2. Context Engine MCP (Managed Context Provider)**](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
      - [**Launch:** December (MCP version); January (full API).](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
      - [**Function:** A plug-in for any coding agent to make cheaper models (e.g., GLM 4.6) perform like GPT-5.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture high-intent search traffic (e.g., "kilocode best models," "best MCP for client").](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [**Monetization:** Free trial → paid plan.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Install MCP → Connect GitHub → Augment Code indexes code.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

### Content Strategy & Programmatic SEO

  - [**Current Focus:** 50% refreshes, 50% new content (comparisons, alternatives, use cases).](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [**New Site Structure:** Content is organized into sections (e.g., `/tools`), which is already driving traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Programmatic SEO Idea:** A user suggested building an AI-powered code wiki.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [**Augment Code's Plan:** Augment Code is already building this internally as a demo for its Context Engine API.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To prove its context engine is superior to competitors like Cognition's "DeepWiki," which has known inaccuracies.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)

### Newsletter Experiment

  - [**Goal:** Test a newsletter to nurture dormant accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [**Decision:** Proceed with the experiment, using Dominic Kent for content.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [**Success Metric:** A "decision gate" will determine if the experiment is viable.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [**Scaling Plan:** If successful, automatically add all expired trials to the list (a potential source of thousands of contacts/week).](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [**Gated Content:** Not a priority for the developer audience. Any future gated content for enterprise leads (CTOs/VPs) will use a separate list.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
      - [Fix the signup conversion bug.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
      - [Send Sylvain a summary of the top 20 content pieces (30-day performance).](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
      - [Launch the newsletter experiment with Dominic Kent.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [**Marisol:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [Continue content production (50% refreshes, 50% new).](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [**Sylvain:**](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Provide the initial draft of the Code Review benchmark for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/Gr1ixczaXayaMt-zws6yN4ah21n_-tsX?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
